message:
test(oracle): add 21 conformance test suites (353 total) + fix clippy issues

New test suites: realistic queries, falsy values, GROUP_CONCAT ordering,
aggregate-scalar mix, type coercion contexts, BETWEEN/IN edges, EXISTS
subquery, multi-table update/delete, string operations, NULL propagation,
subquery in SELECT list, ORDER BY complex, INSERT/REPLACE/UPSERT,
expression nesting, numeric edge cases, views, triggers, CTE advanced,
self-join, compound SELECTs, datetime functions, null ordering,
HAVING complex, derived tables, LIKE/GLOB, indexed queries,
multiple aggregates per group.

Also fix clippy: #[ignore] needs reason, match over () needs explicit type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
